basic_details.job_title: Indbank Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 14 Relationship Manager and Dealer Posts
basic_details.post_name: Relationship Manager and Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals
basic_details.short_information: Indbank Merchant Banking Services Ltd has released the official Relationship Manager and Dealer - For Stock Broking Terminals Recruitment 2026 Notification. A total of 14 vacancies have been announced under the Indbank Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 21 to 35 years with qualifications such as MBA in Marketing/Finance with NISM or equivalent capital market qualifications for Relationship Manager and Graduation with NISM qualifications for Dealer posts can apply through offline mode. The last date to submit the application is 31 July 2026. The official notification PDF and app

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Relationship Manager: Minimum 25 years, Maximum 35 years Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years

qualification.education_qualification: MBA in Marketing/Finance from Reputed University, certified in NISM or equivalent capital market qualifications for Relationship Manager. Graduation with NISM qualifications for Dealer.
qualification.details: Relationship Manager: MBA in Marketing/Finance from Reputed University Preferably certified in NISM or equivalent capital market qualifications Minimum 2 years of experience in Stock broking, Wealth Management, Mutual fund, debt instruments etc. Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals: Graduation with NISM qualifications Minimum one year experience in dealing

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs 4.00 to Rs 5.00 lakh p.a for Relationship Manager, Rs 4.20 lakh p.a for Dealer

selection_process: Screening of applications Interview Final selection
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Indbank Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.indbankonline.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Indbank Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Indbank Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Indbank Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Indbank Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Relationship Manager: MBA in Marketing/Finance from Reputed University Preferably certified in NISM or equivalent capital market qualifications Minimum 2 years of experience in Stock broking, Wealth Management, Mutual fund, debt instruments etc. Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals: Graduation with NISM qualifications Minimum one year experience in dealing

content_sections.heading: Indbank Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Indbank Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Relationship Manager: Minimum 25 years, Maximum 35 years Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals: Minimum 21 years, Maximum 35 years

rows.event: Last date for receipt of duly filled in application
Cutoff date for Age, Educational qualification and Experience

content_sections.heading: Indbank Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Interview Final selection

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Indbank Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.indbankonline.com. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Indbank recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the duly filled application form for the Indbank recruitment is 31st July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this Indbank recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 14 vacancies announced for the positions of Relationship Manager and Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum and maximum age limits for the Relationship Manager post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for the Relationship Manager post is 25 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Dealer post?
faq.answer: For the Dealer post, candidates must have a Graduation degree with NISM qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Relationship Manager position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Relationship Manager position ranges from Rs 4.00 to Rs 5.00 lakh per annum, along with performance-linked incentives.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for Indbank recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the specified address.

faq.question: Q8. What is the experience required for the Dealer post?
faq.answer: A minimum of one year of experience in dealing is required for the Dealer - For Stock broking Terminals position.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Indbank Merchant Banking Services Ltd, which is www.indbankonline.com.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves screening of applications, followed by an interview, and finally, the final selection of the candidates.
